speaker: DUKE
text: The general of our horse thou art, and we,

speaker: DUKE
text: Great in our hope, lay our best love and credence

speaker: BERTRAM
text: A charge too heavy for my strength, but yet

speaker: BERTRAM
text: We’ll strive to bear it for your worthy sake

speaker: BERTRAM
text: To th’ extreme edge of hazard.

speaker: DUKE
text: And Fortune play upon thy prosperous helm

speaker: BERTRAM
text: Great Mars, I put myself into thy file.

speaker: BERTRAM
text: Make me but like my thoughts, and I shall prove

speaker: BERTRAM
text: A lover of thy drum, hater of love.
